chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI health assistant. I can help you with health questions and book appointments with our doctors. How can I assist you today?
chat.askPatientName: To help you better, may I have your name?
chat.askPatientEmail: Great! What's your email address so we can send you appointment confirmation?
chat.askDoctorPreference: Which doctor would you like to see? We have several specialists available.
chat.askAppointmentDate: What date and time works best for you? Please include your timezone.
chat.askReason: What's the reason for your visit?
chat.bookingSuccess: Your appointment has been booked successfully! You'll receive a confirmation email with an ICS calendar invite shortly.
chat.bookingError: I'm sorry, there was an error booking your appointment. Please try again or contact support.
chat.ragNoResults: I don't have specific information about that in my knowledge base. Would you like me to help you book an appointment with a doctor instead?
chat.error: I apologize, but I encountered an error. Please try again.
chat.processing: Let me check that for you...
